name: Enterprise MCP infrastructure
current_usage_summary: Enterprises deploy MCP servers as containerized HTTP services (Azure Container Apps, K8s ingress) with OAuth 2.1 tied to Entra ID/Okta. Patterns from Microsoft ISE: validate tokens at server, On-Behalf-Of flows, avoid per-request IdP round trips. Migration narratives (Scalekit, Okta blog) push API keys → OAuth for AI agents with short-lived tokens and scope limits. mcp-oauth libraries standardize provider plugins. Security reviews focus on DCR, PKCE, token storage, and which SaaS data exfiltration paths MCP enables.
typical_stack: Identity: Entra ID, Okta, Keycloak. Hosting: ACA/K8s + WAF. MCP servers per domain (data, IT ops, CRM). Clients: Claude Enterprise, Cursor Business, custom agents. Observability: server access logs, IdP sign-in logs—rarely unified agent-action audit. API gateways sometimes front MCP; debate whether auth at gateway vs server (Microsoft favors server-embedded for latency).
auth_and_identity_model: Human SSO → OAuth tokens → MCP server validates JWT/scopes per tool. M2M agents use client credentials or token exchange. Service accounts discouraged; OAuth 2.1 M2M patterns emerging for agent-to-agent. STDIO MCP discouraged in enterprise—HTTP only for central policy.
context_and_token_behavior: Less visible to infra teams—owned by AI platform team. Enterprises may mandate tool search/programmatic patterns on client side. Large internal OpenAPI surfaces may adopt Code Mode-style servers.
operational_pain_points: Provisioning MCP servers per team; certificate rotation; token vault compliance. Lack of standard audit event for 'agent X called tool Y with args hash Z'. Policy engines (OPA) not MCP-native—custom per server.
developer_experience_friction: Long security review per MCP server. DCR registration friction across environments. Duplicating corporate API gateways already solved authZ for REST.
gax_mapping: gaxd becomes enterprise control plane: OPA/Rego bundles (roadmap) replace ad hoc server-side checks; tenant vault holds OAuth refresh tokens; every invoke emits audit_id to SIEM. MCP servers demote to adapters behind gaxd or fade as thin facades. SPIFFE for gaxd workload identity (Phase 3 roadmap).
migration_phases: 1) Deploy hosted gaxd in security enclave. 2) Wrap approved MCP servers as adapters; block direct employee MCP to SaaS. 3) Generate manifests from internal OpenAPI catalog. 4) Issue caps via SSO portal (self-service 'request Jira read cap'). 5) Deprecate standalone MCP except partner UI tools.
adapter_or_bridge_strategy: Enterprise integration bus: existing MCP investments wrapped, not rewritten. Okta/Entra token exchange into gaxd vault on login. Policy as code in Git synced to gaxd.
breaking_changes_and_mitigations: Employees lose arbitrary MCP installs—mitigate curated marketplace feeding gax manifests. Latency add of gaxd hop—mitigate co-locate gaxd with adapters in same region/VPC.
infrastructure_changes: New services: gaxd cluster, vault, policy repo, audit pipeline (JSONL → Kafka → SIEM). Network: agents reach gaxd, gaxd reaches SaaS APIs—no direct laptop→production SaaS. IAM: new roles cap-mint-admin vs cap-user.
deployment_topology: Hub: multi-tenant hosted gaxd per business unit. Spoke: optional edge gaxd for dev. High availability, regional. Compare to API management layer (Apigee/Kong) but agent-native.
adoption_drivers: SOC2-friendly audit_id per action. Central revocation (cap TTL + kill switch). Uniform policy across Claude/Cursor/custom agents without reimplementing per client.
adoption_blockers: MCP already approved in 2025 security reviews—re-approval for GAX. Vendor doesn't ship gaxd—internal build burden. Platform vendors may not expose cap injection.
adoption_timeline_estimate: Fortune 500 pilot: 18–30 months after gaxd enterprise GA; regulated industries may mandate faster if breach traced to ambient CLI tokens.
historical_parallel: API Management gateways (2010s): centralized OAuth, rate limits, analytics for REST—GAX is APIM for agent invocations.

primary_sources.title: Microsoft ISE secure MCP on Azure ACA
Scalekit API keys to OAuth for MCP
